description: A customer calls to increase the quantity on an order they just placed, before it ships.

nodes.task_description: Find the sales order and verify it has not yet shipped.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent locates the order and confirms its status is 'Processing'.

nodes.task_description: Check inventory to ensure the additional quantity is available.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms there is enough stock to cover the increased order size.

nodes.task_description: Update the quantity on the sales order line item and resend the order confirmation to the customer.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully modifies the order and the customer receives an updated confirmation.
